fullArticle:
An update is available regarding the 2026 Survivor Series.

No date or venue have been announced for WWE’s annual November PLE.

According to a report from WrestleVotes Radio on Fightful Select on Thursday, WWE had been looking at hosting the 2026 Survivor Series at an international location. However, those plans are said to have fallen through in the last few months.

The report also noted that Boston, Massachusetts, had pushed to host Survivor Series this year, but negotiations with the city fell through when it came to financial terms of the deal. It was noted that this was similar to WWE’s negotiations with Boston to potentially hold John Cena’s last match in the city. That event ultimately went to Capital One Arena in Washington, D.C.
